rulings.Case Title: ARKADY GORELIK et al VS. MIKHAIL GORELIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 17, 2007, LINE 6. Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction. Issue Preliminary Injunction as to: 1- Further encumbering real property at 842 36th Ave., San Francisco, through any mortgaging, refinancing, line of credit, or loan against the real property; 2- Prohibiting any disposing, dispersing, transferring or spending any funds obtained from the Wells Fargo line of credit for any purposes, including funding of this litigation. Deny Request for a preliminary injunction as to: 1- Transferring or disposing of the taxicab van purchased with funds obtained from the Wells Fargo line of credit, and, 2- repaying the $150,000 line of credit against the real property, no later than 5 days from notice of entry of the preliminary injunction. =(302/DEW/VC)
